value_chain_position: Mid-market HCM and payroll platform layer — sells cloud-native HR, payroll, and benefits administration to US mid-market employers (20-1000 employees), earning float income plus software and payment-processing fees.
relative_comps: Paylocity competes directly with Paychex and ADP in the mid-market HCM segment with a more modern UX and superior NPS; 15% YoY growth and 27% FCF margin reflect stable compounding with payroll float income contributing defensively. Growth is moderating from its post-COVID 23% CAGR peak. The fintech_rails tag is justified by payroll float and benefits payment-rail economics; load-bearing score is 3 because ADP/Paychex and Gusto offer credible alternatives at the margin.
